description_long: This is a modern, single-family house with a flat and gable roof combination, surrounded by a fenced yard. The structure features a mix of white and gray exterior walls, large windows, and a prominent driveway leading to a garage. The front area includes a small garden with greenery and a tree, while the backyard contains a rectangular pool. The house has multiple entry points, including a main entrance with a covered porch and side access to the garage. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a variety of window sizes and placements, contributing to a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, single-family house with a flat and gable roof, large windows, a fenced yard, driveway, garage, and backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance with porch, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial view of the backyard and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, large windows, and the rectangular pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side entrance, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, single door, steps, and landscaped approach
